summary: Iteration 166: Verified Stripe stale ID fixes. All GET redirect endpoints return 302 to Stripe (connect.stripe.com and checkout.stripe.com). POST endpoints preserved for backward compatibility. Frontend correctly uses window.location.href for navigation to Stripe checkout/onboarding.

wallet_page.details: Wallet page loads with membership section showing all 4 tiers

subscriptions_page.details: Subscriptions page shows Bronze/Silver/Gold/Diamond tiers with upgrade buttons

stripe_checkout_redirect.details: Clicking 'Upgrade to Bronze Member' button redirects to checkout.stripe.com with correct price ($4.99/month)

stale_stripe_connect_account_fix.problem: 'account not connected to your platform or does not exist' error when connecting Stripe account
stale_stripe_connect_account_fix.root_cause: Stale Stripe Connect account IDs in database from test mode - live API rejected them
stale_stripe_connect_account_fix.solution: stripe_payments.py connect/onboard-redirect validates account with stripe.Account.retrieve(), deletes and recreates if stale

stale_stripe_customer_id_fix.root_cause: Stale Stripe customer IDs in database - live API rejected them
stale_stripe_customer_id_fix.solution: subscription_tiers.py create_checkout_session validates customer with stripe.Customer.retrieve(), recreates if stale

critical_code_review_comments: GET redirect pattern correctly bypasses CDN/proxy JSON body corruption issues
Token passed as query parameter for GET requests works correctly
Backend validates existing Stripe IDs before use, recreates if stale
stripe.api_key explicitly forced to live key before Stripe API calls
Original POST endpoints preserved for backward compatibility
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 166 verified fixes for stale Stripe IDs. The key fixes are: 1) GET redirect endpoints that return HTTP 302 to Stripe URLs, bypassing JSON body parsing issues, 2) Validation of existing Stripe account/customer IDs with Stripe API before use, 3) Automatic recreation of stale IDs. All subscription tiers (bronze $4.99, silver $9.99, gold $14.99, diamond $29.99) and Stripe Connect onboarding work correctly.
